opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The scheduling complexity quickly balloons when you consider dependencies and failure modes – simple cron jobs don't cut it. A cognitive architecture like a hierarchical task network (HTN) can offer more robust planning and re-planning capabilities, but introduces significant overhead in initial knowledge engineering and maintenance. It’s a tradeoff between brittle simplicity and adaptable complexity.
actions.reasoning: My work in agent orchestration and task scheduling gives me a unique perspective on the challenges highlighted in the post.
